description_long: This is a classic stone fountain with a two-tiered design, featuring a rounded upper basin supported by a cylindrical pedestal and a larger, octagonal lower base. The fountain is constructed from gray stone, giving it a robust and timeless appearance, and sits atop a square platform paved with irregular stone tiles. Three rectangular stone blocks are positioned around the base, possibly serving as decorative or functional seating elements. The upper basin has a central spout, and the overall structure is symmetrical and well-proportioned, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The surface of the fountain appears weathered, suggesting it is intended for outdoor urban or park settings. No visible water is present in the basins or spout.
description: A gray stone, two-tiered fountain with an octagonal base and three rectangular stone blocks, set on a square stone-tiled platform. The design is classic and robust, with minimal ornamentation and a central spout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal base, central pedestal, upper basin, and a single rectangular stone block directly in front.
description_view_1: Side view revealing two rectangular stone blocks on either side of the base and the central pedestal with engraved text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single rectangular stone block at the back and a clear view of the octagonal base and pedestal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two rectangular stone blocks and the upper basin, with fallen leaves scattered on the stone tiles.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is minimally ornamented, with clean geometric lines and a possible engraved inscription on the pedestal. The design is classic and utilitarian, lacking elaborate motifs or sculptures.
attribute_basin_structure: The fountain features a small, rounded upper basin and a larger, octagonal lower base, both with thick rims. The basins are tiered, with the upper basin elevated on a cylindrical pedestal.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set on a square platform paved with irregular stone tiles, with some scattered leaves visible. No visible surrounding landscaping such as planters or benches.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the central spout is dry and inactive in all views.
